html:
A Broken Shell is an Item dropped by Slurtles, Snurtles, Slurtle Mounds, and Crustashines when killed or destroyed. Broken Shell can also be obtained by smashing Shell Bells with a hammer.

Broken Shell are required to craft Potted Fern, Shell Beach Turf, Seed Pack-it and the Shell Bumper.

“A puzzle with no solution.”
–Wilson
“Heh. It broke.”
–Willow
“Is broken.”
–Wolfgang
“Pieces of broken slurtle dreams.”
–Wendy
“THEY DON'T FIT BACK TOGETHER”
–WX-78
“Pieces of the broken.”
–Wickerbottom
“I broke his home. I feel bad.”
–Woodie
“They don't fit back together.”
–Maxwell
“Perhaps they can be re-fused somehow.”
–Wagstaff
“They're smashed up gööd.”
–Wigfrid
“We hit it a little too hard.”
–Webber
“Holding on to these doesn't even seem worth it.”
–Walani
“If only I had crazy glue.”
–Warly
“I ain't one fer puzzlers.”
–Woodlegs
“BROKEN HOME O' SLIME BEASTIES”
–Wilba
“Spiky Shell bits”
–Wormwood
“Pfft. Not even good as ammunition.”
–Wheeler
“Broke, but I might salvage something useful.”
–Winona
“Shards of shell I do see here.”
–Wortox
“Aw, it broke!”
–Wurt
“Sorry slurtle.”
–Walter
“A handful of shattered shell bits.”
–Wanda
A Broken Shell is an Item dropped by Slurtles, Snurtles, Slurtle Mounds, and Crustashines when killed or destroyed. Broken Shell can also be obtained by smashing Shell Bells with a hammer.
Broken Shell are required to craft Potted Fern, Shell Beach Turf, Seed Pack-it and the Shell Bumper.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vỏ Hỏng là Vật phẩm rơi ra từ Sên Rùa, Sên Rùa, Gò Sên và Crustashes khi bị giết hoặc tiêu diệt. Broken Shell cũng có thể thu được bằng cách dùng búa đập vỡ Shell Bells.
